results.title: HKSAR V. CHAN PAK KIT
results.charge: Offences: (1)  Falsely pretending to be a public officer (假冒公職人員) (2)  Indecent conduct towards a child under the age of 16 years (向年齡在16歲以下的兒童作出猥褻行為)
results.representations: Present: Ms Angel Yuen, SPP (Ag.), of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR Mr Jonathan Midgley of Haldanes, for the defendant
